    dim_geography_hierarchy.location_name,

JOIN fact_population_core ON dim_geography_hierarchy.hierarchy_id = fact_population_core.hierarchy_id 
JOIN fact_housing ON dim_geography_hierarchy.hierarchy_id = fact_housing.hierarchy_id 
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' 
AND dim_geography_hierarchy.location_type = 'Rural' 
AND fact_population_core.census_year = 1991 
AND fact_housing.census_year = 1991 
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.location_name 
ORDER BY total_population_sum DESC;

question: 1991 ke census year ke liye, har district ko list karo jismein uski total population ka sum aur households ki sankhya ka sum ho, un districts ko filter karo jahan total population 500 se zyada hai, aur results ko total population aur households ki sankhya ke ratio ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T3.TOTAL_POPULATION), SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION_CORE AS T3 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T3.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T3.TOTAL_POPULATION) > 500 ORDER BY SUM(T3.TOTAL_POPULATION) / SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT,
    SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) AS total_population_sum,
    SUM(fh.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) AS households_sum
FROM 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY d
JOIN 
    FACT_POPULATION_CORE fc ON d.HIERARCHY_ID = fc.HIERARCHY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_HOUSING fh ON d.HIERARCHY_ID = fh.HIERARCHY_ID
WHERE 
    fc.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
    AND fh.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
GROUP BY 
    d.DISTRICT

    SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) > 500
ORDER BY 
    (SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) / SUM(fh.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS)) DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT,
    SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) AS total_population_sum,
    SUM(fh.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) AS households_sum
FROM 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY d
JOIN 
    FACT_POPULATION_CORE fc ON d.HIERARCHY_ID = fc.HIERARCHY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_HOUSING fh ON d.HIERARCHY_ID = fh.HIERARCHY_ID
WHERE 
    fc.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
    AND fh.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
GROUP BY 
    d.DISTRICT
HAVING 
    SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) > 500

    (SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) / SUM(fh.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS)) DESC;

    SUM(fh.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) AS total_households,
    AVG(fwt.MALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE) AS avg_male_trade_commerce
FROM 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY dh
JOIN 
    FACT_HOUSING fh ON dh.HIERARCHY_ID = fh.HIERARCHY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_WORKERS_TERTIARY_SECTOR fwt ON dh.HIERARCHY_ID = fwt.HIERARCHY_ID
WHERE 
    fh.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
    AND fwt.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
GROUP BY 
    dh.STATE
ORDER BY 
    total_households DESC;
